zh.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh.Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Darcy於1162年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾諾可頓時，他的父親Lord Thomas d'Arcy II19歲，母親Lady Adelicia Deincourt19歲。他於1190年與Joan Marley在英國林可爾史爾諾可頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1206年在英國林可爾史爾林肯享年44歲。

zh-hans.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾諾可頓
zh-hans.Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Darcy于1162年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾諾可頓时，他的父亲Lord Thomas d'Arcy II19岁，母亲Lady Adelicia Deincourt19岁。他于1190年与Joan Marley在英国林可爾史爾諾可頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1206年在英国林可爾史爾林肯享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Darcy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Brendan, Eamonn, Maeve, Malachy, Niamh, Seamus.  French Gisele, Julien, Normand, Alain, Armand, Cecile, Clemence, Dominique, Emile, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Laure.
English (Lancashire) and Irish: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Arcy in Manche, France, with fused preposition d(e) ‘from’.

Irish: in Ireland, this is generally the Norman name (see 1 above), established in Meath by Sir William D'Arcy in the 1360s, but it was also adopted for Ó Dorchaidhe ‘descendant of the dark one’, from dorcha ‘dark, gloomy’, a Connacht name that fell together with the Norman surname, which was introduced by Sir William D'Arcy and Sir John D'Arcy, Chief Justiciar of Ireland in the 14th century.

variants.name: Darcey
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and Irish (Tipperary): variant of   Darcy  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Darcy was born in 1162, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Lord Thomas d'Arcy II, was 19 and his mother, Lady Adelicia Deincourt, was 19. He married Joan Marley in 1190, in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1206, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Darcy est né en 1162, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lord Thomas d'Arcy II, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Lady Adelicia Deincourt, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Joan Marley en 1190, à Nocton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1206, à Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Darcy 1162 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Thomas d'Arcy II 19 und seine Mutter Lady Adelicia Deincourt 19. Er hat 1190 in Nocton, Lincolnshire, England Joan Marley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1206 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Darcy è nato il nel 1162 nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Lord Thomas d'Arcy II, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Lady Adelicia Deincourt, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Joan Marley nel 1190, nel Nocton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1206, nel Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.Nocton, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトン
ja.Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルン
ja.Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Darcyが1162年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンで生まれた時，父Lord Thomas d'Arcy IIは19歳，母Lady Adelicia Deincourtは19歳であった。1190年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアノクトンでJoan Marleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1206年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Darcy(이)가 1162년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 노크턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Thomas d'Arcy II(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Adelicia Deincourt(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1190년 영국 링코실르 노크턴에서 Joan Marley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1206년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Darcy nasceu em 1162, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Lord Thomas d'Arcy II, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Lady Adelicia Deincourt, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Marley em 1190, em Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1206, em Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Darcy родился в 1162 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Lord Thomas d'Arcy II было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Adelicia Deincourt, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Marley в 1190 г. в местности ноктон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1206 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Darcy nació en 1162, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Lord Thomas d'Arcy II, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Lady Adelicia Deincourt, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Joan Marley en 1190, en Nocton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1206, en Lincoln, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
